description: Debt ledger for transitional sorry/axiom blocks. Each entry must be amortized with a deadline, governor, and pairing strategy.

entries.description: Placeholder proof for `Nat.prime_mul_left_inj` and related lemmas in `interaction_product_injective`.
entries.resolution: Replace `sorry` with a proof using the Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic and prime injectivity.

entries.description: Manifested `sorry` for `canonical_non_parallelism` (Theorem 3.3): the canonical MKT axes n̂_p, n̂_q are never parallel for distinct primes p ≠ q.
entries.resolution: Paired Rust/Kani witness: `crates/multiplicity/rust/multiplicity-math/src/nonparallelism.rs::verify_non_parallelism_distinct_primes` proves non-parallelism over the bounded prime domain [2,97]. Replace with a constructive transcendental proof for the general prime family.

entries.description: Manifested `sorry` for `abelian_collapse` (Abelian Collapse Theorem): single-axis (σ_x) baseline generators O^{orig}_p commute.
entries.resolution: Paired Rust/Kani witness: `crates/multiplicity/rust/multiplicity-math/src/nonparallelism.rs::verify_abelian_collapse_self_commutes`. Replace with the 2x2 matrix identity that exp(i·θ·σ_x) commutes with itself.

entries.name: time_derivative_welldefined
entries.description: Time derivative well-definedness: the partial derivative ∂u/∂t requires a differentiable structure on E and HasDerivAt for the trajectory u : ℝ → E. Tier 3 — requires Mathlib InnerProductSpace and ContDiff.
entries.resolution: Replace with a proof in Mathlib via HasDerivAt or ContDiff on the state space E. Gated until Mathlib integration for InnerProductSpace and ContDiff.

entries.name: tensor_sum_converges
entries.description: Tensor sum convergence: the double sum Σ_{i,j} T_{ij}·∇Φ(u) requires summability in E for the infinite-dimensional case. Trivially finite for finite-dimensional E. Tier 3 — requires Mathlib Summable or HasSum.
entries.resolution: Replace with a proof using Mathlib Summable or HasSum in infinite-dimensional Banach spaces. Gated until Mathlib integration.

entries.name: anomaly_threshold_valid
entries.description: ANOMALY_GOV_THRESHOLD (0.0006) < ANOMALY_GOV_CEILING (0.85). Float.lt is opaque in the Lean kernel without Mathlib; discharged by Rust/Kani witness.
entries.resolution: Paired Rust/Kani witness: `rust/tests/kani/anomaly_threshold_valid_harness.rs::anomaly_threshold_valid` proves the bound over the bounded f64 domain.

entries.name: floer_lipschitz
entries.description: Lipschitz continuity statement for the finite-dimensional Floer operator: ‖F(t,u) - F(t,v)‖ ≤ L·‖u - v‖. To be verified via Kani in Rust for concrete instantiations (Goldilocks field, specific matrix dimensions).
entries.resolution: Kani verification target. See kani_floer_bounds.rs for concrete parameter verification over Goldilocks field.

entries.name: tensor_contract_bound
entries.description: Tensor contraction bound: ‖T·v‖ ≤ ‖T‖_max · n · ‖v‖_max where ‖T‖_max = max |T_{ijk}|. To be verified via Kani in Rust for concrete tensor dimensions.
entries.resolution: Kani verification target. See kani_floer_bounds.rs for concrete tensor contraction verification.
